cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out step by step. So the problem is about Jane's birthday and finding the date 10 days ago from today's date. Let me break it down. First, Jane was born on the last day of February in 2001. Wait, the last day of February is the 28th if it's not a leap year, or the 29th if it is. But 2001 wasn't a leap year, right? Because leap years are every 4 years starting from 2000. 2000 was a leap year, then 2004, 2008, etc. So 2001 is not a leap year. So Jane was born on Feb 28, 2001. Today is her 16-year-old birthday. So that means today is her 16th birthday. So we need to figure out what today's date is. If she was born on Feb 28, 2001, then her 16th birthday would be 16 years later, which is 2017. So adding 16 years to 2001 gives 2017. So her birthday in 2017 would be on Feb 28, 2017. Wait, but 2017 is not a leap year either. So the last day of February in 2017 is still the 28th. Therefore, today's date is Feb 28, 2017. The question is asking for the date 10 days ago from today. So if today is Feb 28, 2017, subtract 10 days from that. Let's count backwards. Starting from Feb 28, subtract 1 day is Feb 27, then 26, 25, 24, 23, 22,
